The '''''Starwind''-class pleasure yacht''' was a luxury starship produced by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. It was originally intended to compete with [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|CEC's]] [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]], which it bore a slight resemblance to, especially in the cockpit. Before the design was completed, it was repackaged as a yacht for wealthy customers and positioned to compete against [[Hyrotii Corporation/Legends|Hyrotii's]] [[Crescent-class Transport]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:StarwindYachtSchematics-SS.png|thumb|left|180px|''Starwind'' schematics]]
Overall, the 50-meter-long ship had a flattened ovoid shape. It had a cargo capacity of 20 tons, and was configured to mount a pair of [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannons]], though the cannons were not included as standard. The ''Starwind''-class yacht was also equipped with a single [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]], which was based on the [[Star Galleon-class frigate|''Star Galleon''-class frigate's]] main cargo bay. Unlike other escape pods, it was equipped with its own [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], and was programmed to make random jumps until reaching the nearest habitable planet or major [[Hyperspace route/Legends|spacelane]], where the ship's crew and passengers could be rescued.<ref name="SS" />

Prominent ''Starwind''-class yachts included [[Mazzic]]'s ''[[Distant Rainbow]]'' and the ''[[Firerider]]'', both of which were extensively modified for [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]].
